claim: Smart Connections is a free Obsidian plugin offering AI embeddings to chat with notes and surface related content; supports local models or 100+ via APIs (Claude, Gemini, ChatGPT, Llama 3).
quote: Chat with your notes & see links to related content with AI embeddings. Use local models or 100+ via APIs like Claude, Gemini, ChatGPT & Llama 3

claim: Smart Connections runs indexing and retrieval locally by default with on-device embeddings, no API key needed; Connections and Lookup work offline after indexing.
quote: Indexing and retrieval run locally by default ... After indexing, Connections and Lookup still work offline.

claim: Smart Connections core remains free; a Pro tier with extras is offered via 14-day free trial yearly or monthly plan, with single/bundle Pro purchases planned for 2026.
quote: Current Smart Plugins users can lock in every Pro plugin under one plan with a 14-day free trial on the yearly option or a flexible monthly plan.

claim: Copilot for Obsidian is a vault-aware chat plugin with Vault QA / RAG mode, @ mentions for files, Ollama and OpenAI-compatible local model support, and an Agent mode in the Plus tier.
quote: THE Copilot in Obsidian — chat-based vault search, web and YouTube support, powerful context processing, and ever-expanding agentic capabilities

claim: Copilot for Obsidian Plus costs $14.99/month or $139.99/year ($11.67/mo annualized); a one-time $349.99 Self-Host Supporter tier provides lifetime self-host access plus 2 years of Plus.
quote: Plus ... Monthly: $14.99 ... Annual: $139.99/year ... Self-Host Supporter ... One-time cost: $349.99

claim: Copilot for Obsidian documents how to run fully local: install Ollama, pull a model and an embedding model (e.g. nomic-embed-text), point the plugin at localhost:11434.
quote: First install Ollama on your computer, run ollama pull to pull a model you like ... fill in the model name, select 'Ollama' as the provider

claim: Smart Composer is a Cursor-style AI chat with @file/@vault context, Apply-Edit one-click edits, MCP support, and works with OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Groq, DeepSeek, OpenRouter, Ollama, and LM Studio.
quote: AI chat assistant for Obsidian with contextual awareness, smart writing assistance, and one-click edits. Features vault-aware conversations, semantic search, and local model support.

claim: Smart Composer's Vault Search RAG automatically injects relevant notes; trigger via Cmd+Shift+Enter or by mentioning @Vault.
quote: automatically finds and uses relevant notes from your vault to enhance AI responses, and can be triggered using a hotkey (Cmd+Shift+Enter on Mac or Ctrl+Shift+Enter on Windows) or by mentioning '@Vault'

claim: Khoj is a self-hostable AI second-brain with semantic search and chat over docs (Markdown, PDF, Notion, Word, etc.), accessible from Obsidian, Emacs, browser, desktop, phone, or WhatsApp.
quote: Your AI second brain. Self-hostable. Get answers from the web or your docs ... gpt, claude, gemini, llama, qwen, mistral

claim: The Khoj Obsidian plugin offers chat, transformer-based incremental search, and similar-notes discovery against an automatically synced vault.
quote: Query your Second Brain from Obsidian ... Advanced natural language understanding using Transformer based ML Models

claim: Text Generator is a template-driven generation plugin supporting OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, HuggingFace, and local models for ideas, titles, summaries, outlines, and paragraphs.
quote: Text Generator is a versatile plugin for Obsidian that allows you to generate text content using various AI providers, including OpenAI, Anthropic, Google and local models.

claim: April 2026 review notes the ecosystem now splits into retrieval engines, workflow operators, and agent surfaces; Smart Connections is highlighted for semantic search and offline embeddings.
quote: Smart Connections is best for semantic search and note discovery, and it's free and can work offline really fast.

claim: Forum users compare Smart Connections to Copilot Vault QA and Smart Composer; Copilot's Vault QA indexes all notes for semantic search similar to Smart Connections.
quote: CoPilot's Vault Q&A tool indexes all your notes and enables semantic search, similar to Smart Connections.

claim: XDA recommends Copilot as the most polished local-LLM option, with native Ollama support and a Relevant Notes feature that pulls vault context into chat automatically.
quote: Copilot is the most polished option for chatting with your notes using a local LLM, supports Ollama natively, and includes a 'Relevant Notes' feature that automatically pulls context from your vault

claim: First-build embedding indexing on a 5,000-note vault takes 20–30 minutes locally; the index is stored in .obsidian and updates incrementally afterward.
quote: a 500-note vault takes a few minutes; a 5,000-note vault may take 20–30 minutes on first build, with the index stored locally in your vault's .obsidian folder and updating incrementally

claim: obsidian-ai-summary is a focused plugin that walks links from the current note and summarizes each linked note in a dialog — useful for weekly/monthly review summaries.
quote: uses OpenAI's GPT-3 to generate summaries of your notes by finding all the links to other notes in the current note and then generating a summary of each linked note

claim: obsidian-ai-summarize is a small dedicated summarization plugin with chunking for large documents, multiple placement options, and customizable profiles.
quote: An intelligent Obsidian plugin that leverages OpenAI's latest models to generate high-quality summaries of your notes, featuring advanced chunking for large documents

claim: The community-maintained Awesome Obsidian AI Tools list catalogues retrieval, summarization, and agent-style plugins with star counts.
quote: Obsidian plugins focused on leveraging AI & LLMs inside of (and beyond) vaults

claim: April 2026 walkthrough demonstrates wiring Smart Connections retrieval into a full agent loop via Model Context Protocol — the new pattern for advanced users.
quote: Obsidian + AI: From Simple Plugin to Full Agent Integration ... connecting Claude Code (Anthropic's CLI agent) to Obsidian via MCP

claim: Newer agentic plugins (e.g. Obsidian Chat, Vault AI Chat) extend beyond Q&A to read notes, make edits, and create files autonomously inside the vault.
quote: an agentic AI assistant that lives in your vault, allowing you to not just answer questions but read notes, make edits, and create files
